title: Implement LiveKit gateway platform
description: Umbrella plan for adding LiveKit as a first-class gateway platform with Discord as a thin control surface and no phase-one audio bridge.

title: Workstream A: LiveKit platform foundation
description: Own gateway/config.py, toolsets.py, and agent/prompt_builder.py. Add Platform.LIVEKIT, env/config loading, hermes-livekit toolset, and LiveKit platform hints.
close_reason: Implemented LiveKit platform foundation in the scoped files.

title: Workstream B: LiveKit runner and delivery plumbing
description: Own gateway/run.py, cron/scheduler.py, tools/send_message_tool.py, and gateway/channel_directory.py. Wire adapter creation, auth maps, default toolsets, delivery routing, and discovery for LiveKit.

title: Workstream C: LiveKit adapter and media runtime
description: Own gateway/platforms/livekit.py. Implement requirements checks, connect/disconnect, room participation, inbound event normalization, and LiveKit-native response publication.

title: Workstream D: LiveKit linkage and mirroring
description: Own gateway/mirror.py plus any new gateway linkage-state module and targeted session tests. Persist LiveKit-to-Discord linkage and mirror linked status/transcript events into Hermes sessions.
close_reason: Linked LiveKit room mirroring support implemented

title: Workstream E: Discord control surface for LiveKit
description: Own gateway/platforms/discord.py. Add slash-command control for LiveKit room creation, linking, status, and join-link feedback while explicitly avoiding a Discord audio bridge.
close_reason: Implemented Discord LiveKit control slash command

title: Workstream F: LiveKit docs and verification
description: Own hermes_cli/status.py, hermes_cli/gateway.py, website docs, and tests/gateway coverage. Expose LiveKit to operators and add regression coverage for config, adapter, mirroring, and Discord control flows.

title: Expose linked LiveKit rooms in gateway discovery and status
description: Tighten gateway discovery or status surfaces so linked LiveKit rooms and their associated control contexts are visible through operator-facing discovery paths where session-backed lookup is required.

title: Mirror linked LiveKit events into control sessions
description: Wire LiveKit room status and transcript events through the linkage model so mirror_to_session receives linked_chat_id and the correct Hermes session history is updated for linked Discord control contexts.

title: Wire Discord LiveKit commands to persisted linkage
description: Use the gateway-owned linkage model from the second wave to make Discord livekit create/link/status commands persist and retrieve actual room associations instead of only emitting control-surface copy.

title: Run combined LiveKit gateway validation and spec closure
description: Run the combined LiveKit gateway regression suite after the second-wave linkage work lands, verify the remaining OpenSpec 4.x and 6.3 scenarios, and capture any residual gaps blocking merge.

title: Persist LiveKit room to Discord linkage model
